  • Uses of ChildCardinality in io.bloviate.gen

    Methods in io.bloviate.gen with parameters of type ChildCardinality
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ChildCountGenerator.Builder
    ChildCountGenerator.Builder.cardinality(ChildCardinality cardinality)
    The ChildCardinality consulted for each parent row: row k emits cardinality.count(k).
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder.cardinality(ChildCardinality cardinality)
    The ChildCardinality that supplies each parent's child count.
